Place your company letterhead image here as:

  letterhead.png

How to obtain (one-time):
- Open your original Word template, double-click the header, select the logo + text block, copy, paste into Paint or Snipping Tool, save as PNG; or
- Export from your official letterhead PDF / design file.

Recommended: width 1600–2400 px, transparent or white background, PNG.

The generator script (see ../scripts/) inserts this file into the Word document header on every run. Without this file, Word output will miss the logo until you add it.
